attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	     WDNRTGL.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY       REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
            WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY,
            WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
            WDNRTGL.PRODUCT_KEY     PRODUCT_KEY,
            WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_KEY     AR_TRX_KEY,
            WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
            WDNRTGL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY   BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY>0 THEN NROL.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY
                WHEN (WDNRTGL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0 
	OR ARTIL_DV.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' 
	OR WDNRTGL.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD='Accrual Revenue') THEN COALESCE(END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
		-999)
                 WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'          )       
	OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') ) /*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	) 
	THEN       
	COALESCE(SOL.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) ELSE
    CASE WHEN WDNRTGL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) THEN COALESCE(END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
         WHEN WDNRTGL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) THEN COALESCE(SO_END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)        
		ELSE -999 END
            END  AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY   SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY   DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
                
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL      
				THEN CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.BK_SS_CD ='QTC' THEN -996
                WHEN WDNRTGL.BK_SS_CD IN ('CG' ,
		'CDC') THEN -995 
			ELSE -997
            END        
			ELSE WDNRTGL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
            END          GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.SALES_REP_NUM        SALES_REP_NUMBER,
                CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)      BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
                CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)       BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
                CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)       BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
                WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT      DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
                WDNRTGL.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
                WDNRTGL.GL_DTM           DD_GL_DATETIME,
                WDNRTGL.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD       DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
                WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME       BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
                WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_DT     DV_FISCAL_DT,
                WDNRTGL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD   DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
                
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='CORP_ADJ'        THEN 'UNKNOWN'        
			ELSE NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
            END         DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
                WDNRTGL.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
                WDNRTGL.SERVICE_TYPE_CD         DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
                WDNRTGL.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD        BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
                
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD<>'CORP_ADJ'        THEN NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME          
			ELSE NULL
            END           AR_TRX_DATETIME,
                'AR'           REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
                WDNRTGL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
                WDNRTGL.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG        DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_CHARGES_FLG      DV_CHARGES_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_MISC_FLG     DV_MISC_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_SERVICE_FLG     DV_SERVICE_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG   DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG    DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_REVENUE_FLG     DV_REVENUE_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT       DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
                
            CASE
                WHEN  WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ'         THEN  0.0000000           
			ELSE WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT
            END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
                WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT        DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
                
            CASE
                WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
	AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' 
	AND WDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY<0  
	AND WDNRTGL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD<>'STANDALONE') THEN 0.0000000 
			ELSE
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ'        THEN  0.0000000       
			ELSE COALESCE ( WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000 ) + COALESCE ( WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT, 0.000000 )
            END
            END DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
                COALESCE(WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000) + COALESCE(WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,0.000000)    DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
                
            CASE
                WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.LINE_TYPE_CD  ='LINE'  THEN      
				CAST(CAST(WDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DECIMAL(27,8))  *   
				CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(27,8))          
			ELSE 0.000000
            END     
			ELSE 0.000000
            END           DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
                
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ'    
				THEN 0.0000000        
			ELSE WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
            END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
                WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT     DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
                
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('INV' ,'ERP_ADJ')  THEN
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' 
	AND (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')     
	AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' 
	AND NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 0
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  
	AND NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' 
	AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 0              
			ELSE  DV_EXTENDED_QTY
            END
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM' THEN
            CASE
                WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit'            
	OR           (UPPER(NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' 
	AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN') )              THEN WDNRTGL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
			ELSE 0.000000
            END        
			ELSE 0.000000
            END          DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
                
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV'   THEN
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' 
	AND (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')        
	AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  
	AND NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 0
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  
	AND NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' 
	AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 0            
			ELSE     DV_EXTENDED_QTY
            END
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM'          THEN
            CASE
                WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit'            
	OR           (UPPER(NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' 
	AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN') )            THEN WDNRTGL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY              
			ELSE 0.000000
            END        
			ELSE 0.000000
            END          DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
                WDNRTGL.GL_DT,
                WDNRTGL.BK_SS_CD,
                
            CASE
                WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')          
	AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' 
	AND WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 0
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  
	AND NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 0
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  
	AND NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' 
	AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 0          
			ELSE WDNRTGL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
            END EXTENDED_QTY,
                WDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
                WDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
                WDNRTGL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
                WDNRTGL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
                WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
                WDNRTGL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
                
            CASE
			/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
			WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ'  AND WDNRTGL.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD IN '40153' THEN Coalesce(NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT,DATE)
			/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' 
	AND WDNRTGL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = -999 THEN
            CASE
                WHEN COALESCE(NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
		'NA') IN ('PA','DA')  THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT 
			ELSE NDCA.DV_TRANSACTION_DT
            END     
			ELSE (
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD<>'CORP_ADJ'  THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT   
			ELSE NULL
            END )
            END TRANSACTION_DT,
                WDNRTGL.GL_POSTED_DTM,
                WDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.SPLIT_PCT,
                WDNRTGL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
                WDNRTGL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                COALESCE (
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY > 0 THEN NROL.BK_DEAL_ID
                WHEN (WDNRTGL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0 
	OR ARTIL_DV.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' 
	OR WDNRTGL.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD='Accrual Revenue') THEN NSORD. BK_DEAL_ID
                WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' 					) 
	OR  ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') ) /*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	)  THEN  SO.BK_DEAL_ID  	
			ELSE NSORD. BK_DEAL_ID
            END ,'UNKNOWN')  DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
                COALESCE (
            CASE
                WHEN (WDNRTGL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0 
	OR ARTIL_DV.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' 
	OR WDNRTGL.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD='Accrual Revenue') THEN NSORD.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
                WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'          )      
	OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/ 
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND ARTL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') ) /*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	)     THEN  SO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 
			ELSE NSORD. BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
            END , 'UNKNOWN')  BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
                
            CASE
                WHEN (REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR') 
	AND (WDNRTGL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY <> -999 
	OR EORCTL.FMV_REASON_CODE  = 'REVENUE TRANSFER' ))      THEN 'Y' 
			ELSE 'N'
            END AS DV_FMV_FLG,
                
            CASE
                WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')  
	AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' 
	AND WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
                WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' 
	AND WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  
	AND NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 'DM'
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  
	AND NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' 
	AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 'DM'     
			ELSE WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
            END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
                
            CASE
                WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
	AND WDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY<0  
	AND WDNRTGL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD<>'STANDALONE' 
	AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV') THEN 0 
			ELSE
            CASE
                WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  IN ('CM',
		'DM') THEN DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT -WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
                WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT 
			ELSE 0
            END
            END DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
                CAST (    COALESCE (    (
            CASE
                WHEN COALESCE (ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,
		'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 
			ELSE
            CASE
                WHEN (WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT <> 0) THEN        CAST (WDNRTGL. GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DECIMAL (26, 7))        
			ELSE 0.0000000
            END
            END), 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL (26, 7))  DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                
            CASE
                WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
	AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' 
	AND WDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY<0  
	AND WDNRTGL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD<>'STANDALONE') THEN 0.0000000 
			ELSE
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ'       THEN 0.0000000      
			ELSE COALESCE (DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000)
            END
            END    DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
                COALESCE (DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000)    DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
                
            CASE
                WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
	AND WDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY<0  
	AND WDNRTGL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD<>'STANDALONE' 
	AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV') THEN 0 
			ELSE
            CASE
                WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM',
		'DM') THEN DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT-DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT
                WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT 
			ELSE 0
            END
            END  DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
                WDNRTGL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
                
            CASE
                WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN
            CASE
                WHEN WDNRTGL.LINE_TYPE_CD ='LINE' THEN        CAST (WDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DECIMAL (38,7))             
			ELSE 0.000000
            END     
			ELSE 0.000000
            END           DV_COMP_FUNC_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
                'N' AS XCAT_FLG,
                'Others' AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                'N' AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
                'N' AS ELA_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
                COALESCE(WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,0.0000000),
                WDNRTGL.POB_TYPE_CD,
                WDNRTGL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
                WDNRTGL.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD,
                WDNRTGL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
                WDNRTGL.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
                'I'        AS ACTION_CODE,
                'I'        AS DML_TYPE,
		WDNRTGL.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
                WDNRTGL.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE AS DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE,
                WDNRTGL.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE AS DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
				,CASE WHEN RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT/10 <WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT THEN WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT*10+1 ELSE
RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT END AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
,WDNRTGL.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
            FROM	$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_GL_P  WDNRTGL     
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC      
			ON ( WDNRTGL.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)     
			INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT       
			ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_KEY)
			/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
			ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(WDNRTGL.GL_DTM AS DATE)
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
			RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
			ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(WDNRTGL.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND 
			WDNRTGL.GL_DTM BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN WDNRTGL.GL_POSTED_DTM 
			WHEN WDNRTGL.GL_DTM < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
			ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
			/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/			
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE  NATT

	 ,REV_TRX.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY/*ADDED AS PART OF REVENUE RESIDUALS*/
	 ,REV_TRX.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY20*/
	 ,REV_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
	 ,REV_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
	 ,CASE WHEN RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT/10 <REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT THEN REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT*10+1 ELSE
RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT END AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT   /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
,REV_TRX.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_END_CU_RET_AR_HST_P REV_TRX
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(REV_TRX.GL_DT AS DATE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND REV_TRX.GL_DT BETWEEN 
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM 
WHEN REV_TRX.GL_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE  WGL
     WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AND
          WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
